title: HandTorchLight
description: A lightweight Minecraft plugin that turns torches into dynamic light sources when held in your main hand or offhand. Fully configurable, supports any light-emitting item.
body:
✨ **Dynamic Torch Lighting for Minecraft** ✨

A lightweight Minecraft plugin that transforms torches into **dynamic portable light sources**. No more spamming torches across caves or dark builds — simply hold a torch in your **main hand** or **offhand**, and the world around you lights up automatically.

🔥 Supports:

* Regular Torches
* Soul Torches
* Redstone Torches
* Copper Torches

⚙️ Fully configurable via `config.yml`:

* Adjust light levels for each torch
* Add any other light-emitting item (lanterns, glowstone, end rods, etc.)
* Reload in-game with `/htl reload` — no restart needed

⚡ Lightweight, simple, and immersive — perfect for survival adventures and exploration.

🛠️ Actively maintained and regularly updated for future Minecraft versions.
